description: CompositionBlack formal trousers made of 76% polyester, 21% viscose and 3% lycra, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with button closures, brand badge at the side of the right pocket, loops on the waist, reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area, and a zipper and button closureFittingSlim FitWash careDry clean onlyCrafted from a polyester-viscose-lycra  blend fabric, this pair of chinos from the arrow Premium collection is lightweight and comfortable, offering easy maintenance. The fine tailoring ensures an excellent fit, offering a flattering silhouette and making it a great addition to your formal wardrobe. Pair it with a formal shirt, classy accessories and leather shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 41.5"Height: 6.1 Waist: 31"
